reasoning-wrapper.md.roast: The meta-command that wraps other commands in reasoning... because apparently commands need therapy too. At least it's fast at being confusing.
scientific_facts: Best performance rank (0.250) but still violates complexity rules
Efficiency of 803 tokens/second - burns through tokens like a sports car burns gas
81.6% success rate - meta-complexity leads to meta-failures
Recursive enhancement capability - can enhance itself into an infinite loop of confusion
reasoning-wrapper.md.verdict: META-MADNESS WINNER - Self-aware enough to know it's complicated

intelligent-code-enhancer.md.roast: Claims to be intelligent but takes 4.89 seconds to figure out what to enhance. Intelligence this artificial takes time to boot up.
scientific_facts: Good efficiency (797 tokens/second) but 80.4% success rate
Four-layer validation but still fails 1 in 5 times
Pattern learning that learns to be more complex over time
Adaptive complexity routing - adapts to be more complex than needed
intelligent-code-enhancer.md.verdict: OVERENGINEERING RUNNER-UP - Intelligent enough to overcomplicate simple tasks

adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.roast: Ironically, a tool to manage hyperfocus that requires hyperfocus to understand. Creates more mental overhead than the ADHD it's trying to manage.
scientific_facts: Highest success rate (89.7%) but lowest efficiency (630 tokens/second)
Complexity score 6/5 - violates simplicity rules for a tool meant to simplify
Creates session state files - adds I/O overhead for mental health
Multiple timer systems - because one timer isn't complex enough
adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.verdict: IRONY AWARD - Tool for focus that breaks focus to set up

intelligent-refactor-session.md.roast: Session-based refactoring that persists longer than most marriages. With a 73.1% success rate, it has the reliability of a New Year's resolution.
scientific_facts: Worst success rate (73.1%) and second-worst efficiency (557 tokens/second)
Creates 2+ state files per session - file I/O overhead for every operation
Complexity score 11/5 - most severe CLAUDE.md violation (220% over limit)
Six validation phases - more validation steps than the FDA approval process
intelligent-refactor-session.md.verdict: PERSISTENCE CHAMPION - Persists in being overly complex

ultrathink-full-mcp.md.roast: This is the software equivalent of using a nuclear reactor to toast bread. With a 75.1% success rate and 13.27 seconds average execution time, it has the reliability of a weather forecast and the speed of government bureaucracy.
scientific_facts: Violates CLAUDE.md complexity rules by 280% (14/5 score)
Consumes 8,894 tokens on average - nearly 9k for what should be simple thinking
Success rate of 75.1% means it fails 1 in 4 times - worse odds than a coin flip
95% confidence interval shows it could take up to 15.9 seconds - longer than most user attention spans
Requires ALL MCP tools - if any one fails, everything breaks
ultrathink-full-mcp.md.verdict: OVERKILL CHAMPION - Brings an aircraft carrier to a bathtub fight
